name: She Was Yours First
description:
A dying wife’s final plea, a billionaire’s desperate proposal, and an innocent child begging for a mother. How much psychological pressure can your relationship survive before she breaks?

For two years, Tika has been your perfect, ordinary girlfriend. But the past she buried has just violently knocked on your front door.

They aren’t here to steal her with malice. They are here to drown her in guilt.

  • Will you be her anchor?

  • Will you falter under the pressure?

  • Or will you watch her sacrifice your future for a dying stranger?

[Fight For Her] | [Let The Guilt Take Her]
creator: BlueMouse
